2.14.title: Log4Shell
2.14.description: This version is vulnerable to Log4Shell (CVE-2021-44228). Attackers can trigger remote code execution through JNDI lookups in Log4j 2.14.
2.14.recommendedFix: Upgrade Log4j to 2.17.1 or newer and remove any vulnerable Log4j artifacts from the build.

5.2.title: Spring Core vulnerable version
5.2.description: This version has known Spring Framework vulnerabilities and should be upgraded to a patched release.
5.2.recommendedFix: Upgrade Spring Framework to a supported patched release.

2.9.title: Jackson deserialization risk
2.9.description: This version is affected by multiple Jackson deserialization vulnerabilities.
2.9.recommendedFix: Upgrade Jackson Databind to a fixed release and avoid unsafe deserialization.
